creator: sbahra@kerneled.org
text:
Thank you for the patch Pavel. Please fix whitespace issues 
on this patch, so it is fine. I suggest that you run
portlint next time to avoid such issues.

Otherwise, this is correct. 

On Thu, Feb 26, 2009 at 10:40:25AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of x11/xmobar,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/132120 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/132120
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
